title: Suspicion Falls on the Straw Hats
description: The attempted assassination of Iceburg throws suspicion across Water Seven and points toward a hidden conspiracy.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Luffy, Nico Robin, Iceburg, Nami, Blueno. The attempted assassination of Iceburg throws suspicion across Water Seven and points toward a hidden conspiracy.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Can I refill my juice, frankly?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: By the way, HAG. Why're you here?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: 'Cause I got no house to sink,

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Are you really gonna believe that?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: You seem to know some- thing.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Don't go around saying random things, HAG.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: That lead-gut isn't the assassin type.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You'll die if you get involved.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Franky, can I have a refill?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You, just drink what you want!!!

summary: The attempted assassination of Iceburg throws suspicion across Water Seven and points toward a hidden conspiracy.
